rationale: The 2023 paper cites Grewal et al. (2013) mainly as prior evidence that monitoring is a recognized governance mechanism in B2B relationships and as part of a broader citation set on governance moderators. The citation appears in grouped/background framing rather than as a focal study whose specific model, findings, or measures are directly built on. The citing paper does not engage the cited paper's distinctive HQ-subsidiary moderation or nonlinear control results in its own theorizing or empirical design.
